Title: ALTER TABLE DROP CONSTRAINT
Description: Remove a table/column constraint from a table

Note : You cannot drop a constraint if it is referenced (e.g. from a foreign key constraint). Use option CASCADE to specify to also drop those referencing objects.
To remove a NOT NULL column constraint use: ALTER TABLE sch.tbl ALTER COLUMN column_name SET NULL.
See also: ALTER TABLE ADD CONSTRAINT , ALTER TABLE ALTER COLUMN .
Associated system tables: sys.keys , sys.fkeys , information_schema.table_constraints , information_schema.check_constraints , information_schema.referential_constraints .
Examples:
ALTER TABLE [ IF EXISTS ] [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
DROP CONSTRAINT
constraint_name
[ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]
